# Contributing to CyberFlipper

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## How to Contribute
- Fork the repository and create a new branch for your feature or fix.
- Submit pull requests with clear descriptions and references.
- Follow the branding and folder structure guidelines in `docs/`.

## Code Style
- Use consistent formatting and comments.
- All payloads and apps must include CyberFlipper branding.

## Reporting Issues
- Use the issue templates in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`.

## Code of Conduct
- All contributors must follow the Code of Conduct.
